description: RiteKit provides social-content and marketing utilities such as hashtag suggestions and stats, emoji suggestions, image and logo generation, link shortening, and related content tools. Its products are offered as web apps and an API for developers to embed these capabilities in their own applications.
summary: RiteKit exposes one public developer integration surface: a REST API at https://api.ritekit.com documented in Postman/API Blueprint and with an OpenAPI mirror from APIs.guru; it authenticates with a developer-issued Client ID passed as the `client_id` query parameter.
